title: Italian Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the goodness of chicken and pilaf with an Italian twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the pilaf mix to the skillet and cook according to the package instructions.
Stir in the dried basil and oregano.
Return the chicken to the skillet and toss with the pilaf mixture.
